title: CREDIT REPORT REVIEW - 211info
text: CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC CREDIT REPORT REVIEW Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on how to acquire a credit report, reviews of credit reports by certified consumer interviewers, and suggestions on how to improve the report or dispute errors. 820 Crater Lake Avenue Suite 202 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (541) 779-2273 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 779-2273 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Call for appointment. FEES: $40 for one person or $70 for a couple for the merged three credit bureau report that includes credit scores. Cost for individual reports available on request. Cash or money order; does not accept credit/debit cards or personal checks. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On Crater Lake Avenue between Stevens and McAndrews in the Cedar Mall Services: Credit Report Ordering Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: MONEY MANAGEMENT - PERSONAL FINANCIAL COUNSELING MONEY MANAGEMENT - PRE-FILING BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING PRE-DISCHARGE FINANCIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC
